mathematiciam ，_POINCARE -once
attacked-- 一TOLSTOY，  who  had
suggested:that,pursuing “science for
Science'` S” Sake” is foolish。 The
achievements of industry, for example,
would never have seen the light of day
had the practical-minded existed alone
and had not these advances been
pursued by disinterested fools，

The glory of the human spirit，so Said
the famous Kbnigsberg mathematician
JACOBL is the single purpose of al

Science，

We must not believe those, who today
with philosophical bearing and a tone
of Superiority prophesy the downfall of
culture and accept the ignorabimus，
For us there is no ignorabimus, and in
my opinion even none whatever in
natural science, In place of the foolish
ignorabimus let stand our slogan'

We must know，

We will know.
